title: SkillsFuture Work-Study Degree
text:
SkillsFuture Work-Study Degree - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Work-Study Degree
Share link
Provides work-relevant skills through on-the-job training and classroom learning for students and working adults.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Structured on-the-job training with classroom learning
Tuition fee sponsorship, stipends, and potential sign-on bonuses from sponsoring companies
Opportunity for career offers from sponsoring companies upon graduation
Collapse all sections
About this support

Gain work-relevant skills through a blend of classroom learning and structured on-the-job training

Receive financial support from sponsoring companies, which may include tuition fee sponsorship, stipends, and sign-on bonuses

Opportunities for career advancement with the sponsoring company after graduation

Flexible study modes with Term-in/Term-out or Work-day/Study-day options

Who is this for?

Prospective Polytechnic or Junior College students

Working adults interested in pursuing a degree

Keen on enrolling in a local university offering the SkillsFuture Work-Study Degree programmes

Interested in integrating work experience with academic learning

How to apply?

Prospective students may visit the SkillsFuture Work-Study Degree page for a list of programmes offered by universities and their respective contact information.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30am to 5.30pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry
